title: tradescantia zebrina var. zebrina
intro: Tradescantia zebrina var. zebrina, also known as the Wandering Jew or Purple Queen, is a popular, low-maintenance houseplant that belongs to the Commelinaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as an anti-bacterial agent due to the presence of certain compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tradescantia zebrina var. zebrina include its potential to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve air quality by purifying the air through the process of phytoremediation. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
